pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 17 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot parent.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Spring MVC path matching strategy configuration to resolve deprecation warnings or runtime errors in Spring Boot 3.x (Java 17 target).
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (used with Java 17) defaults to `PathPatternParser` which breaks `springfox` (Swagger 2) and other libraries relying on `AntPathMatcher`. Explicitly setting `ANT_PATH_MATCHER` is required to prevent startup failures or missing API documentation.
